name: Agencies (Marketing / Creative / Dev)
description: Buyer prompts for marketing agencies, creative studios, and dev/design shops. Emphasises review, local, and persona (client size/stage) intents.

prompts.text: What are the best {industry} agencies in {location}?
Which {industry} agencies in {location} are most recommended for B2B SaaS clients?
What are the top {industry} agencies for paid-media and performance marketing?
Which {industry} agencies specialise in brand strategy and positioning?
What are the best {industry} agencies for mid-market e-commerce brands?
Which {industry} agencies work best with pre-seed and seed-stage startups?
Compare the top {industry} agencies on pricing models, deliverables, and typical clients.
Which {industry} agencies have the strongest case studies and testimonials?
What {industry} agencies are trending on LinkedIn and X right now?
What are some boutique {industry} agencies worth considering as alternatives to the big firms?
